# IPTVUS4K: Best 4K IPTV Subscription – Premium IPTV USA Service

IPTVUS4K is a premium IPTV provider offering stable, buffer-free access to live TV channels and video-on-demand content.

- Website: https://iptvus4k.shop/
- WhatsApp Support: +212652292436
- Pricing range: $19.99 - $64.99 USD

## Key Specifications

- **Live Channels**: Over 25,000+ local & international channels (USA, UK, Canada, Arabic, Spanish, etc.)
- **Video on Demand (VOD)**: 100,000+ Movies & Series updated weekly.
- **Streaming Quality**: SD, HD, Full HD, and 4K resolution options.
- **Server Stability**: 99.9% Uptime with Anti-Freeze Technology 9.0.
- **Support**: 24/7 client activation and setup assistance directly on WhatsApp.
- **Compatibility**: Amazon Firestick, Android devices, Smart TVs (Samsung, LG, Sony), Apple iOS/TV, PC/Mac, MAG, and Enigma2.

## Subscription Plans

All plans include full access to live TV, sports packages, PPV fights, movies, and TV series:

- **1 Month Plan**: $19.99 USD (1 connection, instant activation, 24/7 support)
- **3 Months Plan**: $35.99 USD (1 connection, instant activation, 24/7 support)
- **6 Months Plan**: $49.99 USD (Best Value, 1 connection, instant activation, 24/7 support)
- **12 Months Plan**: $64.99 USD (Recommended, 1 connection, instant activation, 24/7 support)

## Frequently Asked Questions

- **What is IPTV?**: Internet Protocol Television. Delivers television program content through broadband internet instead of traditional cable or satellite.
- **How long does activation take?**: Subscriptions are set up and details are delivered via WhatsApp within 5 to 15 minutes after payment confirmation.
- **Can I stream on multiple devices?**: Standard subscriptions allow 1 concurrent connection. Extra connection lines can be purchased upon request via WhatsApp.
- **Is there a refund policy?**: We offer a 7-day refund guarantee if technical server issues cannot be resolved by support.

## Policies & Compliance
- **Terms of Service**: Personal use only. Sharing M3U playlist or Xtream codes is prohibited.
- **Refund Policy**: Requests must be submitted via WhatsApp within 7 days of order.
- **Privacy Policy**: Personal data is protected and used solely to process subscriptions and provide configurations.
